typography.rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight). Overlines must be uppercase, tiny, and wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]). Mono font for all KPIs, stats, and coordinates. Center align only if it improves hierarchy; left-align data and paragraphs.

colors.rules: Never use pure black or pure gray. Tint with blue/slate. The UI should remain monochromatic (zinc/slate) so the map layer colors stand out. Forbidden: Teal green/blue for standard UI elements.

surfaces.panels: Crystal Glass variant: bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-2xl. This ensures the map is visible beneath the UI panels.
surfaces.cards_internal: Flat Solid: bg-white/5 border border-white/5 rounded-md p-4.
surfaces.rules: CRITICAL: Do NOT use completely transparent backgrounds where text overlays the map. Always use the Crystal Glass surface.

structure: Floating Left Panel (w-80 or w-96): Contains Title, Layer Toggles (Bento list), and Legends. Pin to top-left with m-6 z-[400].
Floating Right Panel (w-96): Contains KPI stats, Recharts (Bar/Line for selected region), and Demographic details. Pin to top-right with m-6 z-[400].
layout.spacing: Generous Spacing (p-6, p-8) inside panels. Use High Density Grid (gap-4) for KPI bento boxes inside the right panel.

components.layer_toggles: Customized Shadcn Switch or Checkbox. When active, the switch thumb or track should match the specific layer's color.
components.kpi_cards: Minimalist, top-aligned data. Large Mono font for the number. Sparkline chart below.
components.charts: Recharts. Tooltips must use Crystal Glass surface. Lines/Bars color-coded to match the map layer they represent.
components.map: React Leaflet. Must use a Dark Mode tile provider (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter) so neon data layers pop.

motion.panels: Slide in from left/right on initial load.
motion.interactions: Hover states on map polygons should subtly increase opacity and show a tooltip. Toggling a layer should smoothly fade the layer in/out.
motion.rules: Disable transforms if using universal transitions. Use specific transitions (transition-colors, transition-opacity).

accessibility.data_testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute. e.g., data-testid='layer-toggle-coca'.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA standards against backgrounds.

media.instructions: This is a map-heavy dashboard. Avoid unnecessary photos. Use Phosphor icons for layer iconography.

3d_libraries.instructions: Use React Leaflet as the core. 3D isn't strictly necessary, keep it 2D for analytical clarity.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install React Leaflet and its types: yarn add react-leaflet leaflet && yarn add -D @types/leaflet
Configure Tailwind with the specified typography and colors in tailwind.config.js.
Use a dark basemap for Leaflet (e.g., 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png').
Build the UI as absolute positioned overlay panels over the full-screen map. Use z-[400] for UI panels so they sit above Leaflet's default panes.
Implement Shadcn UI for the controls (Switch, Card). Note: Use .jsx/.js files, do NOT create .tsx files.

Mock the geospatial data (GeoJSON) for Colombia for the 5 layers if real backend data is not immediately available. Ensure the mock GeoJSON has varying intensities for the layers to demonstrate visual overlaps.
Ensure map polygons have onEachFeature handlers for hover tooltips and click-to-detail.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
Remember to output standard JavaScript (.js/.jsx), NOT TypeScript (.tsx).
